package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_per_record_debug_log_in_batch: Layer: Logging overhead. Flag debug logging per batch record on hot ingestion paths.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule563PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario563Positive(records []Rule563PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
